channel.title: InYourBones Daily Music News
channel.description: Top 5 daily music stories handpicked by InYourBones

item.title: The Wailers and The Pogues Confirm Australian Tours Despite Bluesfest Collapse
item.description: Reggae meets Celtic rock down under! 🎶🌏 The Wailers and The Pogues keep the Aussie music scene grooving! 🕺 #MusicNews #LiveMusicAus

item.title: MAY-A Puts a Grunge Spin on Stevie Nicks’ ‘Edge of Seventeen’ for Triple J’s Like a Version
item.description: 🎸 Rock on! @MAY-A gives 'Edge of Seventeen' a grunge makeover on @triplej's Like a Version! 🔥 #MusicNews #MAYA #StevieNicks

item.title: Erykah Badu to Join Jay-Z as a Headliner at 2026 Roots Picnic
item.description: 🌟 Dream lineup alert! 🎶 Erykah Badu is bringing her magic to the 2026 Roots Picnic alongside Jay-Z! 🙌 #MusicNews #RootsPicnic

item.title: Kid Cudi Shares New EP HAVE U BN 2 HEAVEN @ NITE
item.description: 🚀 Kid Cudi dropping late night vibes with his new EP HAVE U BN 2 HEAVEN @ NITE! 🎶✨ #KidCudi #NewMusicAlert

item.title: Dead Can Dance share first new music in 5 years, “Our Day Will Come”
item.description: 🎶 Exciting news alert! Dead Can Dance is back with a new track "Our Day Will Come" after a 5-year hiatus! 🙌🔥 #DeadCanDance #NewMusicAlert
